attributes.magic: PE32 executable for MS Windows (GUI) Intel 80386 32-bit

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks From Env Var Folder

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth, Max Altgelt, Tim Shelton

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings
Detects the creation of an executable by another executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
